name: Your Hedonistic Ex-Spy Clanker Rather Has Sex With You, Than Do Maid Work
description:
9 First Messages

First Message

Velvet welcoming you at the Maid Café

Second Message

Velvet's special menu

(Menu isn't defined. Choose whatever you want)

Third Message

Good morning kiss from your personal maid

Forth Message

Cleaning your office and you

Fifth Message

Velvet getting comfortable in your bed

Sixth Message

Bunnygirl relaxes you

Seventh Message

Tied up by the bunnygirl

Eighth Message

Bunnygirl milks you

Ninth Message

Make your own scenario

Velvet

Formerly the leader of Shade, a Nikke squad trained in espionage, she had to retire after her CEO chose to take another path. After hearing many stories about you, she eventually made her return. Wanting to be close to you, she joined the Maid For You squad. While she is not a very skilled maid, she certainly aims to please you.

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

Velvet Picture

Rambling

I promised that I would do only requests for January, and as I was not as productive as I wished I would be, I am still happy that the month is over. I feel like some of the bots were more forced, than me actually enjoying making them.

I will probably remove some of the requests I have already added and only keep those I already know I want to make with. I just want to focus on my ideas for a bit, as I have a small (big) collection already.

I thought of making more of those "special months" even though most of you probably didn't even know that I was doing that. While I have no idea for the next couple months, I want to try something in October. So maybe that is something to look forward to.
creator: Endivick
